name: zoom-team-chat-search
description: Read-only search across Zoom Team Chat messages and meeting transcripts.
long_description: Provides 22 read-only tools for Zoom Team Chat (channels, messages, threads, attachments, shared spaces, mention groups, pinned messages, bookmarks) and meeting transcripts. Includes AI-Companion-powered search and grounded Q&A across Zoom Meetings, Chat, and Docs. Requires a Zoom Marketplace OAuth app with the read-only scopes documented in the README.

client_id.title: Zoom Client ID
client_id.description: From your Zoom OAuth app at marketplace.zoom.us

client_secret.title: Zoom Client Secret
client_secret.description: From your Zoom OAuth app at marketplace.zoom.us

redirect_uri.title: OAuth Redirect URI
redirect_uri.description: Must match the redirect URI configured on your Zoom app.
